code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut value = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
        i = i + 1
      else
        if sign == 1 and value > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_num = false
        value = 0
        sign = 1
      end
    else
      if is_digit
        in_num = true
        value = b - 48
        sign = 1
        i = i + 1
      else if is_sign
        in_num = true
        value = 0
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
        else
          sign = 1
        end
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
  end
  if in_num
    if sign == 1 and value > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
